plant.description: All parts of the plant are severely toxic.

method_1.method: Processed into oils for external use.

medicinal_uses: Used topically for stubborn skin infections and leprosy.
Effective for hair loss related to scalp issues.
Assists in cardiac conditions in minute, expert doses.

safety_profile.warning: EXTREMELY TOXIC. Fatal if ingested in small amounts.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
